positive: A highly stylized, minimal geometric depiction of a blooming sunflower and surrounding botanical elements. The design features strong, contrasting black and white lines with limited use of muted gold and deep sapphire blue accents. The composition should be perfectly centered, utilizing clean silhouettes and linework, evoking a modern tribal or Art Deco style. The sunflower should be the dominant, symmetrical element. Use high contrast and thick, confident lines suitable for screen printing on apparel. Style: Contemporary abstract vector art, tattoo flash style, maximalist yet controlled. Lighting: Flat, evenly lit, graphic style. Texture: Ink print on fabric.
